scenarios.description: outputSettings() returns the default OutputSettings instance when no setter was called
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("http://example.com"); // uses default constructor
scenarios.expectedResult: returned OutputSettings is the same instance as doc.outputSettings() initial field; charset()==UTF-8, prettyPrint()==true, syntax()==html

scenarios.description: outputSettings() returns the newly set OutputSettings instance after setter invocation
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("http://example.com"); OutputSettings custom = new OutputSettings().charset("ISO-8859-1").prettyPrint(false).syntax(OutputSettings.Syntax.xml);
scenarios.expectedResult: returned OutputSettings == custom; charset()==ISO-8859-1, prettyPrint()==false, syntax()==xml
